if the Sun, Moon, Mars and Saturn occupy respeetively
the 8th, 6th, 2nd and l2th houses of the Horoscope, the
native turns blind as a result of the defect in the humour
of the strongest of the planets afflicting. Here Mars will
harm the 2nd house and Moon, while Saturn will harm
the 12th house and Sun.
Fame (I)
The native of the Birth Chart 36 of Leo ascendant is
stated by the Sapta Rishl Nadi as a man of high fame.
The factors forJame are the lagna and the loth house
anrd, of course, thelr lords togetlrer wlth Sun. This would
